requirement_topic.zh: 生态设计要求——家用制冷器具（法规（EU）2019/2019）
requirement_topic.zht: 生態設計要求——家用製冷器具（法規（EU）2019/2019）

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 (implementing Directive 2009/125/EC) sets ecodesign requirements for household refrigerating appliances placed on the EU market. It applies to refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezers, wine-storage appliances, and absorption refrigerators. Key requirements in force from 1 March 2021 include: (1) Maximum energy consumption limits — appliances must not exceed an Energy Efficiency Index (EEI) calculated from rated volume, climate class, and a reference consumption formula set out in Annex IV; (2) Minimum rated volume per compartment type (minimum 10 litres for chiller/chill drawers); (3) Noise labelling requirements (dB(A) re 1 pW); (4) Product information requirements — technical parameters must be entered into the EPREL database before market placement; (5) No-load energy consumption limits for freezers with fast-freeze function. A second set of stricter EEI thresholds applies from 1 March 2023. The regulation also sets requirements on minimum rated lifetime, resistance to climate conditions, and noise power level.
summary.zh: 法规（EU）2019/2019（实施生态设计指令2009/125/EC）为投放欧盟市场的家用制冷器具设定了生态设计要求。适用范围涵盖电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合、酒类贮藏器具及吸收式电冰箱。自2021年3月1日起生效的核心要求包括：（1）最大耗电量限制——器具的能效指数（EEI）不得超过附件IV规定的根据额定容积、气候等级及参考耗电量公式计算所得的限值；（2）各隔间类型的最低额定容积（冷藏/冷藏抽屉最低10升）；（3）噪声标识要求（分贝(A)以1皮瓦为基准）；（4）产品信息要求——在投放市场前须将技术参数录入EPREL数据库；（5）带速冻功能冷冻箱的无负荷耗电量限制。更严格的EEI门槛值第二阶段自2023年3月1日起适用。本法规还规定了最低额定使用寿命、气候适应性及噪声功率级要求。
summary.zht: 法規（EU）2019/2019（實施生態設計指令2009/125/EC）為投放歐盟市場的家用製冷器具設定了生態設計要求。適用範圍涵蓋電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合、酒類貯藏器具及吸收式電冰箱。自2021年3月1日起生效的核心要求包括：（1）最大耗電量限制——器具的能效指數（EEI）不得超過附件IV規定的根據額定容積、氣候等級及參考耗電量計算公式計算所得的限值；（2）各隔間類型的最低額定容積（冷藏/冷藏抽屜最低10升）；（3）噪聲標識要求（分貝(A)以1皮瓦為基準）；（4）產品資訊要求——在投放市場前須將技術參數錄入EPREL數據庫；（5）帶速凍功能冷凍箱的無負荷耗電量限制。更嚴格的EEI門檻值第二階段自2023年3月1日起適用。本法規還規定了最低額定使用壽命、氣候適應性及噪聲功率級要求。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 — Ecodesign requirements for household refrigerating appliances — OJ L 315, 5.12.2019

EN 62552-1:2020, EN 62552-2:2020, EN 62552-3:2020 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (Parts 1, 2, 3 — harmonised measurement standards for Ecodesign and energy labelling)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. The standard is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the energy labelling system administered by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC). Products must display the China Energy Label (CEL) before sale. The GB 12021.2 framework uses a different test methodology and EEI calculation basis than EU Regulation 2019/2019 — EU EEI values and Chinese energy grades are not directly comparable.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。GB 12021.2为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的试验方法及EEI计算基准与欧盟法规2019/2019不同——欧盟EEI值与中国能效等级不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。GB 12021.2為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的試驗方法及EEI計算基準與歐盟法規2019/2019不同——歐盟EEI值與中國能效等級不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Three major gaps exist between Chinese energy compliance and EU Ecodesign requirements: (1) Different EEI calculation — Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 Annex IV specifies a precise EEI formula based on rated volume and compartment type; GB 12021.2-2015 uses a different grade-based framework. A Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does NOT guarantee compliance with EU EEI thresholds without independent recalculation to EU methodology. (2) EPREL registration — manufacturers must register each model in the EU Product Registry for Energy Labelling (EPREL) at eprel.ec.europa.eu before market placement. There is no equivalent Chinese pre-registration database obligation for export models. (3) 2023 thresholds — the stricter second-tier EEI thresholds applicable from 1 March 2023 may disqualify refrigerators that were compliant under earlier EU rules or that meet only Chinese Grade 1 standards. Measurement to EN 62552 series is required for EPREL filing.
gap.zh: 中国能效合规与欧盟生态设计要求之间存在三大差距：（1）EEI计算方法不同——法规（EU）2019/2019附件IV规定了基于额定容积和隔间类型的精确EEI计算公式；GB 12021.2-2015采用不同的等级框架。中国1级或2级能效评定不等同于符合EU EEI门槛，须按EU方法独立重新计算。（2）EPREL注册——制造商须在投放市场前将每款产品在EU能效标识产品注册数据库（EPREL）（eprel.ec.europa.eu）登记注册。中国对出口产品无同等的预注册数据库义务。（3）2023年门槛——自2023年3月1日起适用的更严格第二阶段EEI门槛，可能使此前符合早期EU规则或仅符合中国1级标准的电冰箱不合格。EPREL申报须依据EN 62552系列进行测量。
gap.zht: 中國能效合規與歐盟生態設計要求之間存在三大差距：（1）EEI計算方法不同——法規（EU）2019/2019附件IV規定了基於額定容積和隔間類型的精確EEI計算公式；GB 12021.2-2015採用不同的等級框架。中國1級或2級能效評定不等同於符合EU EEI門檻，須按EU方法獨立重新計算。（2）EPREL登記——製造商須在投放市場前將每款產品在EU能效標識產品登記數據庫（EPREL）（eprel.ec.europa.eu）登記。中國對出口產品無同等的預登記數據庫義務。（3）2023年門檻——自2023年3月1日起適用的更嚴格第二階段EEI門檻，可能使此前符合早期EU規則或僅符合中國1級標準的電冰箱不合格。EPREL申報須依據EN 62552系列進行測量。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compliance with Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 and EPREL registration are both legally required before EU market placement; applies from 1 March 2021 (Phase 1) and 1 March 2023 (Phase 2 stricter EEI thresholds)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 Ecodesign requirements are legally binding for EU market placement of household refrigerators. Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grades do not substitute for EU EEI compliance — independent measurement to EN 62552 and EEI recalculation to EU Annex IV methodology are required. EPREL pre-registration is a hard gate: no EPREL record = cannot legally sell in the EU.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】法规（EU）2019/2019生态设计要求对家用电冰箱在欧盟市场投放具有法律约束力。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能替代EU EEI合规——须依据EN 62552独立测量并按EU附件IV方法重新计算EEI。EPREL预注册是强制性门槛：无EPREL记录即无法在EU合法销售。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】法規（EU）2019/2019生態設計要求對家用電冰箱在歐盟市場投放具有法律約束力。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能替代EU EEI合規——須依據EN 62552獨立測量並按EU附件IV方法重新計算EEI。EPREL預登記是強制性門檻：無EPREL記錄即無法在EU合法銷售。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — EU Energy Label (Regulation (EU) 2019/2016) + EPREL Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——欧盟能效标签（法规（EU）2019/2016）+ EPREL注册
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——歐盟能效標籤（法規（EU）2019/2016）+ EPREL登記

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/2016 (on energy labelling of refrigerating appliances) requires that all household refrigerating appliances placed on the EU market bear the EU Energy Label displaying the energy efficiency class (A to G scale, rescaled from 1 March 2021), annual energy consumption (kWh/annum), noise class and level, total volume of each compartment type, and the model identifier linking to EPREL. Suppliers must register the product model in the EPREL database (https://eprel.ec.europa.eu) before market placement and upload a product datasheet and label graphic. Dealers must display the label in-store and in online listings. The label format and content requirements are set out in Annexes III and IV of the Regulation.
summary.zh: 法规（EU）2019/2016（家用制冷器具能效标识）要求所有投放欧盟市场的家用制冷器具须附贴欧盟能效标签，标注能效等级（自2021年3月1日起采用A至G新评级体系）、年耗电量（千瓦时/年）、噪声等级及噪声值、各类隔间总容积以及链接至EPREL的型号标识符。供应商须在投放市场前在EPREL数据库（https://eprel.ec.europa.eu）注册产品型号，并上传产品数据表及标签图形。经销商须在门店及在线商品列表中展示该标签。标签格式和内容要求载于本法规附件III和IV。
summary.zht: 法規（EU）2019/2016（家用製冷器具能效標識）要求所有投放歐盟市場的家用製冷器具須附貼歐盟能效標籤，標注能效等級（自2021年3月1日起採用A至G新評級體系）、年耗電量（千瓦時/年）、噪聲等級及噪聲值、各類隔間總容積以及連結至EPREL的型號識別符。供應商須在投放市場前在EPREL數據庫（https://eprel.ec.europa.eu）登記產品型號，並上傳產品數據表及標籤圖形。經銷商須在門店及線上商品列表中展示該標籤。標籤格式和內容要求載於本法規附件III和IV。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/2016 — Energy labelling of refrigerating appliances — OJ L 315, 5.12.2019
Regulation (EU) 2017/1369 — Framework Regulation for Energy Labelling (supersedes Directive 2010/30/EU)
EPREL database — https://eprel.ec.europa.eu (mandatory pre-registration before market placement)

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is governed by the China Energy Label (CEL) system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016). The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption. Labels are administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR. There is no pre-registration database analogous to EPREL; manufacturers self-declare grade based on testing against GB 12021.2. The EU rescaled A-to-G label (2021) and China's 1-to-5 grade system are structurally different and not cross-comparable without recalculation.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识制度依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施，采用中国能效标识（CEL）体系，展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量。标识由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。目前没有类似EPREL的预注册数据库；制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明能效等级。欧盟2021年重新调整的A至G评级标签与中国1至5级体系在结构上存在差异，未经重新计算不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識制度依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施，採用中國能效標識（CEL）體系，展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量。標識由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。目前沒有類似EPREL的預登記數據庫；製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明能效等級。歐盟2021年重新調整的A至G評級標籤與中國1至5級體系在結構上存在差異，未經重新計算不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two mandatory actions with no Chinese equivalent: (1) EPREL pre-registration — each model must be registered in EPREL before the first unit ships to an EU customer; the EPREL record requires: model identifier, technical parameters per Annex II of Reg. 2019/2016, EEI value per Ecodesign Reg. 2019/2019, noise level, compartment volumes, and a machine-readable label file. (2) Physical EU Energy Label — the A-to-G label (Annex III format) must be affixed or available at point of sale and in online listings. Chinese CEL labels must be replaced or supplemented; they cannot serve as the EU label. Failure to register in EPREL is a market surveillance trigger — EU national authorities actively check EPREL records for products sold online.
gap.zh: 两项强制性要求在中国无对应规定：（1）EPREL预注册——每款产品型号须在首批产品向欧盟客户发货前在EPREL完成注册；EPREL记录须包含：型号标识符、依据法规2019/2016附件II的技术参数、依据生态设计法规2019/2019的EEI值、噪声级、隔间容积及机器可读的标签文件。（2）实体欧盟能效标签——A至G标签（附件III格式）须在销售点及在线商品列表中展示。中国能效标识须被替换或补充；不能充当欧盟标签使用。未能在EPREL注册将触发市场监管——欧盟各国主管机构会主动核查在线销售产品的EPREL记录。
gap.zht: 兩項強制性要求在中國無對應規定：（1）EPREL預登記——每款產品型號須在首批產品向歐盟客戶發貨前在EPREL完成登記；EPREL記錄須包含：型號識別符、依據法規2019/2016附件II的技術參數、依據生態設計法規2019/2019的EEI值、噪聲級、隔間容積及機器可讀的標籤文件。（2）實體歐盟能效標籤——A至G標籤（附件III格式）須在銷售點及線上商品列表中展示。中國能效標識須被替換或補充；不能充當歐盟標籤使用。未能在EPREL登記將觸發市場監管——歐盟各國主管機構會主動核查線上銷售產品的EPREL記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EU Energy Label display and EPREL registration are legally required before EU market placement under Regulation (EU) 2019/2016; rescaled A-to-G label mandatory from 1 March 2021
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EPREL registration and EU Energy Label display are mandatory hard gates for EU market access for household refrigerators. Chinese exporters must complete EPREL registration (with EN 62552-based measurements and EU EEI calculation) before any unit enters the EU market. The Chinese CEL label does not satisfy EU labelling obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】EPREL注册与欧盟能效标签展示是家用电冰箱进入欧盟市场的强制性门槛。中国出口商须在任何产品进入欧盟市场前完成EPREL注册（依据EN 62552测量及欧盟EEI计算）。中国能效标识不满足欧盟标识义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】EPREL登記與歐盟能效標籤展示是家用電冰箱進入歐盟市場的強制性門檻。中國出口商須在任何產品進入歐盟市場前完成EPREL登記（依據EN 62552測量及歐盟EEI計算）。中國能效標識不滿足歐盟標識義務。
